Package org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ob.src.impl

Class TextFormatObservationSourcePlugin

java.lang.Object
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ObservationSourcePluginBase
org.aavso.tools.vstar.plugin.ob.src.impl.TextFormatObservationSourcePlugin
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPlugin
public class TextFormatObservationSourcePlugin extends ObservationSourcePluginBase
This intrinsic plug-in reads a variable star data file format containing lines of text or comma separated fields, and yields a collection of observations for one star. In particular, it supports AAVSO Download and the so-called "simple format".

    • getDocName

      public String getDocName()
      Description copied from interface: IPlugin
      Get a document file name for this plugin. Can be a full (absolute) URL or a file name that assumes the plugin doc directory as a base URL.
      Specified by:
      getDocName in interface IPlugin

    • getNewStarType

      public NewStarType getNewStarType()
      Description copied from class: ObservationSourcePluginBase
      This method returns the NewStarType enumerated value. Most observation sources will use the default implementation, a few may override it.
      Overrides:
      getNewStarType in class ObservationSourcePluginBase

    • getObservationRetriever

      public AbstractObservationRetriever getObservationRetriever() throws IOException, ObservationReadError
      Description copied from class: ObservationSourcePluginBase

      Get an observation retriever for this plug-in.

      A new observation retriever instance should be created for each call to this method to avoid side-effects relating to clearing of collections by Mediator upon each new-star-artefact creation operation.

      Specified by:
      getObservationRetriever in class ObservationSourcePluginBase
      Returns:
      An observation retriever.
      Throws:
      IOException
      ObservationReadError
